name: 11ai-git-operations
description: Modular, safety-first skills for common Git operations, repository workflows, and troubleshooting.

interface.shortDescription: Run common Git tasks safely and clearly.
interface.longDescription: A modular Git toolbox for inspecting repository state, staging and committing changes, synchronizing branches, managing local branches and stashes, recovering work, answering command questions, and troubleshooting failures with read-first safeguards.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the 11ai-git-operations skills for this Git task.
